raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I placed a {$21000.00} deposit with my American Express card for a {$120000.00} timeshare package after being told I had 12 months to pay and could cancel at any time for a refund. In XX/XX/year>, when I attempted to use the membership, the vacation club refused service unless I paid the entire balance immediately, which violated the agreement. When I attempted to cancel, they refused to return my deposit and instead demanded 50 % of the full package cost. 

I filed a dispute with AMEX on XX/XX/year>, for services not rendered, but AMEX closed it within days using a template response, citing the XXXX window, without contacting the merchant or requesting documentation. I promptly appealed, provided details, and offered documents, yet AMEX denied the dispute again within XXXX business day with the same response. AMEX has failed to conduct a reasonable investigation under the Fair Credit Billing Act, and I am seeking reversal of the {$21000.00} charge.
